sprint.name: Sprint 1
sprint.goal: Harden proven PrimeNG families, generate token artifacts, and make the workflow repeatable.

completedWork.title: Create Storybook acceptance checks
completedWork.summary: Create acceptance stories for proven PrimeNG component families.
completedWork.includes: Default, theme, a11y, stress, federation, and promotion checks
completedWork.doneCriteria: Acceptance table is visible in Storybook guidance and /qa.

completedWork.title: Prepare Style Dictionary source
completedWork.summary: Move tokens to JSON source and generate CSS plus a Zeroheight-friendly export.
completedWork.includes: Token tier model and initial semantic-to-PrimeNG mappings
completedWork.blockerSummary: Token CSS was manually authored before the generator was added.
completedWork.doneCriteria: Token browser displays source-backed token rows.

currentStatus.title: Harden proven PrimeNG families
currentStatus.summary: Prove low-risk PrimeNG families in Storybook and the /qa federation checkpoint.
currentStatus.includes: Button, Tag, Card, Table, Paginator, Dialog, Toast
currentStatus.blockerSummary: Some component families still need direct-remote and shell-composed proof.
currentStatus.doneCriteria: Storybook acceptance checks exist and /qa remains green.

currentStatus.title: Track blockers in the matrix
currentStatus.summary: Keep risky PrimeNG reintroduction decisions visible and owned.
currentStatus.includes: Blank hosts, overlay clipping, token generation, route-critical fallback risk
currentStatus.blockerSummary: Blockers need owners, affected families, and next actions.
currentStatus.doneCriteria: Each blocker has owner, affected family, mitigation, and next action.

workLeft.title: Publish Zeroheight skeleton
workLeft.summary: Create governed portal pages from the local documentation skeleton.
workLeft.includes: Home, Foundations, Components, Patterns, Developer Guide, Governance
workLeft.blockerSummary: Needs final published portal creation outside the repo.
workLeft.doneCriteria: Published-guidance model includes app inventory, component matrix, accessibility, and release notes.

workLeft.title: Citizen Services PrimeNG reintroduction
workLeft.summary: Reintroduce simple PrimeNG form controls into the Citizen Services remote.
workLeft.includes: InputText, Select, checkbox/radio, and supporting components
workLeft.blockerSummary: Route-critical PrimeNG hosts previously rendered blank in some remote compositions.
workLeft.doneCriteria: InputText, Select, checkbox/radio, and supporting components pass direct remote, shell, and verify:fed checks.

blockers.title: Blank/raw PrimeNG hosts
blockers.mitigation: Use stable native content first; promote only after direct and shell checks.

blockers.title: Overlay clipping and z-index
blockers.mitigation: Prefer appendTo body and verify in shell-composed routes.

blockers.title: Manual token source
blockers.mitigation: Create token JSON and generate CSS plus docs artifacts from one source.

blockers.title: Form controls not reintroduced
blockers.mitigation: Reintroduce InputText and Select in /qa, then direct remote, then shell route.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Component renders with real PrimeNG internals and public-sector tokens.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Storybook story visible and no raw/blank host.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Neutral, vibrant, pastel, light, and dark are exercised.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Visual check plus pnpm verify:fed after promotion to /qa.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Labels, keyboard focus, and contrast are explicit.
acceptanceChecks.gate: A11y addon review and route-level axe pass.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Long text, empty data, loading state, or invalid state exists.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Story includes at least one non-happy-path state.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Candidate is verified directly and through shell composition.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Direct remote and shell route both render stable content.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Component matrix status is updated after validation.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Status moves to Active or Proven with notes.

recommendations: Keep /qa and Storybook as the visual proof points for completed component work.
Move next items into progress only after a direct owner and acceptance gate are clear.
Regenerate reports and screenshots before executive or lead developer reviews.
